message.content:
| Finding                                                                                                    | Statistic                                    | Source Type          | N        | Confidence Tier |
| :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :------------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :------- | :-------------- |
| Exercise reduced depression symptoms                                                                       | SMD of -0.50                                 | Meta-analysis        | 14,170   | Irrefutable     |
| Weekly religious attendance correlated with depression rate                                                | 15.6% vs 20.5%                               | Large survey         | 550,000  | Strong Signal   |
| Suicidal ideation in ex-Jehovahs Witnesses                                                                 | 33%                                          | Small study          | 47       | Hypothesis      |
| Social media use >3hrs/day associated with depression in adolescents                                       | OR 2.13                                      | Systematic review    | 89,000   | Strong Signal   |
